creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


On the contrary, I prefer that a package provides a rather complete set 
of features, and that people with lighter needs use a port. 

Of course, if there is a real need for a minimal package, I could 
consider a slave package, with most options deactivated by default. 

Regards, 
--  
Th. Thomas.
